task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., workspace dashboard or chat interface is loaded, user profile shows admin).
The main chat window displays the 'release-updates' channel as the active room.

task_completion.description: Assign 'agent.user' as a moderator of the channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The channel members list or user info panel shows 'agent.user' with a 'Moderator' role or badge, or a system message confirms the role assignment.

task_completion.description: Enable read-only mode for the channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The channel settings panel shows the 'Read Only' toggle enabled, or the message input box is disabled with a message like 'This room is read only'.

task_completion.description: Set the channel announcement to the specified text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The channel header, announcement banner, or room info panel displays exactly: 'This channel is now archived. Release tracking for this cycle is complete. Contact @admin for questions.'
An 'Archived' badge or icon is visible in the channel header, or a system message states the channel has been archived.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Rocket.Chat web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Rocket.Chat GUI, with visible clicks, menus, and settings panels.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected announcement into a text editor or a standard chat message.
integrity.visual_evidence: The announcement text is placed specifically in the channel's 'Announcement' settings field or banner, not just sent as a regular chat message or typed in a separate text application.

integrity.description: The channel state changes (moderator, read-only, archive) are applied using genuine Rocket.Chat UI controls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Rocket.Chat UI elements (toggles, user context menus, room info panels) are used to apply the changes, rather than inspecting/editing HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target channel: 'release-updates'. Target user for moderator role: 'agent.user'. Expected exact announcement text: 'This channel is now archived. Release tracking for this cycle is complete. Contact @admin for questions.' Verify these exact strings and states within the Rocket.Chat UI.
